text.title: Two-Layer Secret Scanning Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree mapping CI egress + framework presence to a rule from 01-core-rules.xml. Every leaf is a conclusion ref bound to a rule id.

conclusion.verdict: run gitleaks layer only; document gap; revisit weekly
baseline first; ratchet legacy out; then enable two layers

example.trace: active=true → egress=true → legacy_present=false → trufflehog-verified-in-ci → two-layer config live

text.example: Canonical traversal from root question through branches to a single conclusion.
